question:
Over $225M committed to the Monad public sale?

Description: This market will resolve to “Yes” if total commitments for the Monad raise on Coinbase exceeds the number specified in the title before the raise closes. Otherwise, it will resolve to “No.”

The resolution source is the "Total requested" value displayed on the Coinbase raise page available at https://www.coinbase.com/token-sales/monad.

If the final commitment amount cannot be verified by December 31, 2025, 11:59 PM ET, or if relevant information becomes permanently unavailable within the market timeframe, this market will resolve to “No.”

evidences.title: Paradigm leads $225 million round for Monad Labs, which ...
evidences.content: A new player on the scene, Monad Labs, finalized a $225 million round led by Paradigm with additional funding by investors including Electric Capital and Greenoaks to build a layer 1 blockchain to challenge competitors such as Solana and Sui. (Fortune previously reported that Monad was in talks with Paradigm to raise money at a $3 billion valuation in March.) [...] ## 'A much more performant blockchain' After raising a $19 million seed round announced in 2023, Monad's $225 million funding round represents the largest crypto fundraise of 2024 so far, according to Crunchbase's Web3 Tracker, signaling that the sector's bear market is beginning to thaw. Paradigm, the crypto VC firm leading the round, is reportedly raising a new fund over $750 million. The round also represents one of the first crypto deals for Greenoaks Capital, the VC firm led by veteran investor Neil Mehta, after a small bet on FTX. [...] Armed with its new round of funding, Hon said that Monad aims to deploy its mainnet by the end of the year, as well as a testnet in the next couple of months. Monad Labs currently has around 30 employees and plans for a native token, although Hon declined to comment on whether it...

Schneider Monad is taking advantage of the soaring demand for early stage crypto investments. On Monday, the upcoming blockchain project announced it will sell $188 million worth of tokens to retail investors on Coinbase through a newly announced token sale platform. [...] According to Monad, the sale will help decentralise the project by distributing its MON token more broadly among its community. For retail investors, it's another opportunity to get exposure to a high-risk bet in an unlaunched crypto project. Monad has previously raised a total of $248 million over multiple funding rounds, according to Tracxn, a market data platform. This includes a $19 million seed round in early 2023, and a $225 million Series A round that closed in March 2024. The token sale will be the first time a crypto project has attempted to sell tokens directly to US retail investors in more than seven years. In...

evidences.title: How to Participate in Coinbase's Token Sale Platform - CCN.com
evidences.content: Why is Coinbase’s new token sale platform important? For the first time since 2018, U.S. retail investors can legally participate in new token launches under a compliant framework. It brings crypto fundraising back onshore, within U.S. regulation, making the process safer, fairer, and more transparent. When does the first token sale happen? The first sale will feature Monad (MON), a high-performance blockchain protocol. The sale will run from Nov. 17 to 22, 2025. Who can participate? Anyone with a verified Coinbase account that meets the platform’s KYC (Know Your Customer) and compliance requirements can join. Users must also be in eligible regions, primarily the U.S. [...] Monad launch details. | Credit: Monad X profile Coinbase states that the algorithm is designed to make token launches fairer and more sustainable, focusing on community-driven growth rather than short-term hype. ## Monad (MON): The First Sale The Monad token (MON) is the first project to launch through Coinbase’s new platform. evidences.title: Monad's Mission: Why Monad?
evidences.content: MON is the Monad network’s native token, used to pay gas fees, secure the chain via staking, and align validators, developers, and users around the growth of the protocol. At the launch of Monad Public Mainnet, the total initial supply of MON will be 100 billion tokens. Up to 7.5B $MON tokens (7.5% of initial token supply) will be made available to the public for purchase in the public sale at a price of $0.025 per token. The Coinbase token sales platform accommodates a minimum bid size of $100 and a maximum bid size of $100,000 (subject to higher maximum thresholds for Coinbase One subscribers pursuant to the Coinbase token sale platform terms). [...] ## Public sale on Coinbase token sales platform Decentralization is only possible with widely distributed ownership of the MON token. A healthy ecosystem consists not only of developers and users, but also tokenholders. We are pleased to share that Coinbase has provided a platform for the Monad Foundation to distribute MON through a public sale by its subsidiary, MF Services (BVI), Ltd. The Coinbase token sales platform brings public sales to retail purchasers in the US and globally, allowing for smaller allocations across more pa...

evidences.title: MON Tokenomics Overview - Monad.xyz
evidences.content: Explore the Ecosystem Back to Announcements # MON Tokenomics Overview By: Monad Foundation 10 Nov 2025 # Monad Memo Stay up to date with all things Monad by subscribing to our newsletter, Monad Memo. Subscribe ## Introduction to MON and Initial Supply MON is the native token that powers the Monad protocol. The MON token is primarily used for transaction fees on the Monad network and for staking to secure the Monad network. At the launch of Monad Public Mainnet, the total initial supply of MON will be 100 billion tokens. The allocation of MON among different groups is summarized below: ## Estimated Token Release Schedule [...] Locked tokens cannot be staked. The intent of this is twofold: to ensure that staking rewards initially contribute to the public circulation of MON and to avoid an initial concentration of rewards among those individuals (team members and investors) involved directly with the project. All locked tokens in the initial token supply are anticipated to be fully unlocked by the fourth anniversary of the Monad Public Mainnet launch in Q4 2029. ## Allocation Group Details ### Public Sale [...] ## Allocation Group Details ### Public Sale Up to 7.5B MON tokens (7.5%...

evidences.title: Get early access to upcoming tokens - Coinbase
evidences.content: Example: In a sale with 1000 tokens available, three participants (Low, Middle, High) request 100, 500, and 1000 tokens respectively. All participants are first allocated 100 tokens, leaving 700 tokens remaining and 1300 in unfilled demand from Middle and High requests -- Low's request has been completely filled. The remaining 700 tokens are split evenly between Middle and High's because they both have unfilled requests (400 and 900 respectively). Middle and High receive 350 tokens in the second round of distribution, each receiving a total of 450 tokens. ## Help Center If you need more support please visit our help center or check out the FAQs. [...] If the total number of requested tokens is greater than the total available tokens, a distribution mechanism, called “filling up from the bottom,” attempts to create a broad distribution among sale participants and limit asset concentration among large buyers. The mechanism first identifies the user with the smallest unfilled amount (“the bottom”) and grants the specified amount to all requestors. The system then identifies the next smallest unfilled amount and grants that amount to all requestors. The system continues fulfilling r...

evidences.title: What Is Zora? Onchain Media Protocol and ZORA Token | Support
evidences.content: # Who built Zora? Zora was founded in 2020 by Jacob Horne and Tyson Battistella. Horne previously worked at Coinbase and has written extensively on hyperstructures, public goods crypto infrastructure that runs forever without a company behind it. His Mirror.xyz posts from 2021 to 2024 outline the protocol's philosophical bet that media will eventually be priced and traded onchain by default. ​ Zora has raised roughly $60M across seed and Series A rounds led by Haun Ventures, Coinbase Ventures, and Paradigm. The team operates out of distributed locations with no formal HQ, mirroring the protocol-first philosophy. ​ # Zora vs OpenSea vs Manifold vs Sound.xyz

evidences.title: What Is ZORA? The Viral Creator Coin Quietly Disrupting ...
evidences.content: ## What Is the ZORA Token? ### ZORA Token Utility In April 2025, ZORA token launched on Base with a total supply of 10 billion tokens. According to ZORA, the token was created mainly to allow for participation and incentive models throughout the protocol rather than act as a governance token. According to ZORA’s documentation, the token is designed for entertainment, social engagement, and ecosystem incentives. As an example, $ZORA is the default reward token for payments to creators and the platform, as well as liquidity for newly created creator markets. ### Creator Incentives and Rewards

evidences.title: Coinbase Acquires Echo for ~$375M - insights4vc
evidences.content: This move echoes initiatives by other platforms. Binance pioneered exchange-hosted token launches in the last cycle. CoinList and Republic facilitated token sales with U.S. investor compliance. Firms such as Galaxy Digital and 21.co have developed distribution channels for new crypto assets. Coinbase’s entry into primary offerings raises competitive stakes, but also risks. It will need to manage potential conflicts of interest, for example avoiding any implicit guarantee that a token raised via Echo will later be listed on Coinbase’s exchange. The company plans to keep Echo as a standalone platform for now and only integrate Sonar directly, partly to maintain a neutral listings process. [...] 2023–2024: Transitioned from commentator to builder by founding Echo in 2023. Echo operated as a non-custodial platform that enabled vetted communities to invest in early-stage crypto projects. By mid-2025 it facilitated more than two hundred million dollars of funding through private sales and a public launchpad called Sonar. Notable raises included MegaETH, Initia, and Plasma. 2025: Sold Echo to Coinbase in late 2025. Accepted an advisory role at Paradigm, a leading crypto venture firm, w...

evidences.title: Zora Case Study
evidences.content: ‍ #### The flywheel in action With 0x, Base App was able to launch with full support for Zora coin swaps. Following the launch of the Base App, daily token creation on Base jumped from around 6k at the beginning of July to nearly 50k by the end of the month. And for the first time, Base (where coins are minted) overtook Solana in daily token issuance. In total, over 1.8M tokens have been minted on Zora across approximately 200k creators The increase in value for Zora creators has been equally significant: daily creator rewards rose from less than $1k in early July to consistently over $10k per day by the end of July, peaking at nearly $375k. ‍ ‍ [...] ‍ ‍ Zora’s token model incentivizes participation, enables value discovery, and engagement with token activity. By generating returns for both creators and their supporters, it rewards early believers and long-term content creators. Creators and fans alike can get started with the Zora app. Zora’s coin structure holds the promise of creating a self-reinforcing flywheel. More posts lead to more trades, which attracts more attention, and brings in more users. But for this flywheel to really take off, Zora needs distribution. It needs...

evidences.title: Token sales | Coinbase Help
evidences.content: • If you no longer want the token, wait for distribution, then sell or convert it. • Selling a token shortly after purchase ("flipping") may result in smaller allocations in future sales. Allocation details• If total requests exceed available supply, allocations are determined using a “fill-from-the-bottom” approach to promote broad distribution. • You may receive fewer tokens than requested, but will only pay for tokens received. • Any unused USDC is returned to your balance. Allocation limits• Vary from sale to sale (see token sale page for details) Taxes• Taxes on token purchases are based on the fixed purchase price. • US customers may receive an IRS Form 1099-DA for buying or selling tokens. [...] Tap to view affected services 󰅈  癩 # Token sales Token sales allow you to purchase new crypto assets prior to their listing on Coinbase. You commit USDC in exchange for the new token, which you receive before it’s listed on Coinbase for general trading. Availability• Refer to the eligible countries list (below), but note that regional availability varies from sale to sale. • Review each sale announcement to determine eligibility. • Not available in New York.
